content.heading: Acceptance of Terms
content.text: By accessing or using VeteransLedger ('the Archive', 'this site', 'we'), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, please discontinue use immediately. These terms apply to all visitors, researchers, and users of the site.

content.heading: Nature of the Archive
content.text: VeteransLedger is a personal historical archive maintained for educational, research, and commemorative purposes. It documents the military, political, and personal history of the Axis powers during the Second World War (1939–1945) and the preceding period (1919–1939). The site is operated by a private individual and is not affiliated with any government, military organisation, political party, or academic institution.

content.heading: Educational Purpose
content.text: All content on this site is presented for educational and scholarly purposes only. You agree to access and use this archive solely for lawful purposes: historical research, education, academic study, or personal understanding of the historical period documented. You agree not to use this site for any purpose that violates applicable law or that could facilitate hatred, discrimination, or incitement against any person or group.

content.heading: No Endorsement
content.text: The presence of historical content documenting the ideologies, symbols, speeches, propaganda, or actions of the NSDAP, the Axis powers, or any associated regime or individual does not constitute endorsement, glorification, promotion, or approval of those ideologies, regimes, or actions. VeteransLedger explicitly and unequivocally condemns fascism, Nazism, antisemitism, racial supremacism, and all related ideologies.

content.heading: Permitted Use of Content
content.text: You may view, print, and download content from this archive for your own non-commercial personal, educational, or research use. Limited quotation for academic citation, commentary, or educational purposes is permitted provided that attribution is given to VeteransLedger and the relevant source. No content may be reproduced for commercial purposes without prior written permission.

content.heading: Prohibited Uses
content.text: You may not: (1) reproduce, republish, redistribute, or resell content from this archive for commercial gain; (2) use content in a manner that glorifies, promotes, or incites hatred on the basis of race, religion, nationality, or any other characteristic; (3) scrape, crawl, or systematically harvest data from this site by automated means without prior written permission; (4) attempt to gain unauthorised access to the site's administrative systems; (5) use this site in any way that violates applicable local, national, or international law.

content.heading: Accuracy of Information
content.text: While every reasonable effort is made to ensure historical accuracy, this archive is compiled by a private researcher from secondary and primary sources. Casualty figures, unit strengths, dates, and command structures are often subject to ongoing historical revision and scholarly debate. Where significant disagreement exists among historians, we have attempted to note this. Do not rely solely on this archive for academic citation — consult primary sources, peer-reviewed scholarship, and institutional archives.

content.heading: Advertising
content.text: This site may display third-party advertisements served by Google AdSense or similar advertising networks. We do not endorse the products, services, or content advertised. Advertisements are served automatically; we do not pre-screen individual ads. If you encounter an advertisement you find inappropriate, please contact us.

content.heading: External Links
content.text: This site may contain links to external websites for reference purposes. We have no control over and accept no responsibility for the content, privacy practices, or accuracy of any external site. Inclusion of a link does not imply endorsement.

content.heading: Intellectual Property
content.text: Original editorial content, translations, commentary, and structural organisation on VeteransLedger are the intellectual property of VeteransLedger and its contributors. Historical documents and public domain materials are reproduced for educational purposes. See our Copyright Policy for full details.

content.heading: Limitation of Liability
content.text: This archive is provided 'as is' without warranty of any kind, express or implied. To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, VeteransLedger disclaims all liability for any inaccuracies, omissions, errors in historical content, or any direct, indirect, or consequential damages arising from your use of or reliance on this site.

content.heading: Removal Requests
content.text: If you are a rights holder, family member, or affected party who believes that specific content should be removed from this archive for legal, privacy, or dignity reasons, please submit a removal request via our contact form. We review all requests in good faith and will remove content where appropriate.

content.heading: Changes to These Terms
content.text: These Terms of Use may be updated at any time without prior notice. The 'Last Updated' date at the top of this page reflects the date of the most recent revision. Continued use of the archive after any modification constitutes your acceptance of the revised terms.

content.heading: Governing Law
content.text: These Terms of Use are governed by applicable law. Any disputes arising from use of this site shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of the applicable jurisdiction.

content.heading: Contact
content.text: For questions about these terms, permitted uses, or to report content concerns, contact us at VeteransLedger@gmail.com.
